creator: vendion@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 216247
radarr-0.2.0.1504.diff

This patch updates radarr to version 0.2.0.1504. The changelog includes:

New features:

- Allow update to aphrodite from V0.2 [ta264]
- Ignore #recycle folders (Synology Recycle bin folder) [Qstick]
- Added Dolby Digital Plus with Atmos (#3902) [DavidSpek]
- Use New Update Server [Qstick]

Fixes:

- List Sync tries to add duplicate movies
- Made Username required for UserCustomList (#4255) [Diazole]
- CustomFormat size specs in already grabbed check [ta264]
- Add crossorigin use-credentials attribute to manifest tag [pkoenig10]
- Don't use staging API for Nightly, It's Down [Qstick]
- Mark "BAD" Nzbget Downloads as Failed [Qstick]
